embed.title: !nest
embed.description: Alerts for pokemon nest spawns — reliable repeat spawn points as reported by nest data sources.

fields.name: By pokemon
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}nest charmander`
`{{prefix}}nest dratini larvitar beldum d:3000`
`{{prefix}}nest everything` — any nest (likely a lot of alerts!)

fields.name: Minimum spawn rate
fields.value: `minspawn:10` — only nests with 10+ spawns per hour (helps filter out low-activity reports)

fields.name: Distance and area
fields.value:
`d:3000` — nests are typically worth larger radii than live alerts
`area:region_north`
